debug_info.goal: ⊢ ∃ s, s.Infinite ∧ s.Pairwise fun m n => (2 ^ ↑n - 3).Coprime (2 ^ ↑m - 3)

failed_attempts:
let step (np : ℕ × ℕ) : ℕ × ℕ :=
    let n := np.1
    let p := np.2
    let n' := (n + 1) * p.totient
    (n', p * (2 ^ n' - 3))
  let vals : ℕ → ℕ × ℕ := fun k ↦ Nat.rec (3, 5) (fun _ ↦ step) k
  let n : ℕ → ℕ := fun k ↦ (vals k).1
  let p : ℕ → ℕ := fun k ↦ (vals k).2
  have h_props : ∀ k, 3 ≤ n k ∧ Nat.Coprime 2 (p k) ∧ (∀ i ≤ k, (2 ^ n i - 3) ∣ p k) := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      simp [n, p, vals]
      refine ⟨by decide, by decide, fun i hi ↦ ?_⟩
      rw [Nat.le_zero_eq] at hi; rw [hi]; simp [n, vals]
    | succ k ih =>
      obtain ⟨hn, hp, hdiv⟩ := ih
      simp [n, p, vals, step] at *
      let n_new := (n k + 1) * (p k).totient
      have hp_pos : 0 < p k := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by intro h; rw [h] at hp; contradiction)
      have htot_pos : 0 < (p k).totient := Nat.totient_pos hp_pos
      have hn_new : 3 ≤ n_new := calc
        3 ≤ n k := hn
        _ < n k + 1 := Nat.lt_succ_self _
        _ ≤ (n k + 1) * (p k).totient := Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right _ htot_pos
      have x_odd : Odd (2 ^ n_new - 3) := by
        rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even]
        intro h
        have h2 : 2 ^ n_new = (2 ^ n_new - 3) + 3 := by
          apply Nat.sub_add_cancel
          calc 3 ≤ 8 := by decide
               _ ≤ 2^3 := by decide
               _ ≤ 2^n_new := Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) hn_new
        rw [h2, Nat.even_add] at h
        simp at h; exact h (Nat.even_pow.mpr ⟨by decide, Nat.ne_of_gt (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (by decide) hn_new)⟩)
      refine ⟨hn_new, ?_, ?_⟩
      · apply Nat.Coprime.mul hp
        rw [Nat.coprime_two_right]; exact x_odd
      · intro i hi
        rw [Nat.le_succ_iff_le_or_eq] at hi
        rcases hi with hi | rfl
        · apply Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_left (hdiv i hi)
        · apply Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_right (dvd_refl _)
  let f (k : ℕ) : ℕ+ := ⟨n k, Nat.lt_of_succ_le (h_props k).1⟩
  refine ⟨Set.range f, ?_, ?_⟩
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro a b h
    wlog h_le : a ≤ b
    · exact (this b a h.symm (Nat.le_of_not_le h_le)).symm
    rcases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le h_le with rfl | h_lt; · rfl
    exfalso
    have mono : ∀ k, n k < n (k+1) := by
      intro k
      simp [n, vals, step]
      have : 1 ≤ (p k).totient := Nat.totient_pos (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
           intro z; have := (h_props k).2.1; rw [z] at this; contradiction))
      calc n k < n k + 1 := Nat.lt_succ_self _
           _ ≤ (n k + 1) * (p k).totient := Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right _ this
    exact Nat.lt_irrefl _ ((StrictMono.nat mono).lt h_lt ▸ h ▸ Nat.lt_irrefl _)
  · rw [Set.pairwise_range]
    intro i j hij
    wlog h_lt : i < j
    · exact (Nat.Coprime.symm (this j i hij.symm (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.le_of_not_lt h_lt) hij.symm)))
    let xi := 2 ^ n i - 3
    let xj := 2 ^ n j - 3
    have j_pos : j > 0 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) h_lt
    let prev := j - 1
    have h_prev : j = prev + 1 := (Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos j_pos).symm
    rw [h_prev] at xj ⊢
    have h_div : xi ∣ p prev := (h_props prev).2.2 i (Nat.le_pred_of_lt h_lt)
    have h_cong : 2 ^ n (prev + 1) % xi = 1 := by
      let P := p prev
      have h_cop : Nat.Coprime 2 P := (h_props prev).2.1
      have h_euler := Nat.ModEq.pow_totient h_cop
      have : n (prev+1) = (n prev + 1) * P.totient := by simp [n, vals, step]
      rw [this, Nat.pow_mul]
      exact Nat.ModEq.pow _ (Nat.ModEq.of_dvd h_div h_euler)
    apply Nat.coprime_of_dvd'
    intro k hk_xj hk_xi
    have h_val : 2 ^ n (prev + 1) = xi * (2 ^ n (prev + 1) / xi) + 1 := 
      Nat.eq_add_of_sub_eq (Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.mod_lt _ (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by 
         intro h; rw [h] at hk_xi; exact Nat.not_dvd_of_pos (by decide) hk_xi)))) (h_cong)
    have h_a : k ∣ 2 ^ n (prev + 1) - 1 := by
        rw [h_val, Nat.add_sub_cancel]; exact Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_left hk_xi _
    have h_sub : (2 ^ n (prev + 1) - 1) - xj = 2 := by
        apply Nat.sub_sub_self
        calc 3 ≤ 8 := by decide
             _ ≤ 2^3 := by decide
             _ ≤ 2^n (prev+1) := Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) (h_props (prev+1)).1
    have : k ∣ 2 := by rw [← h_sub]; exact Nat.dvd_sub (Nat.sub_le_sub_left (by decide) _) h_a hk_xj
    rcases Nat.dvd_two_iff.mp this with rfl | rfl
    · rfl
    · have : Odd xi := by
         rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even]; intro h; 
         have : 2^n i = xi + 3 := Nat.sub_add_cancel (by calc 3 ≤ 8 := by decide; _ ≤ 2^n i := Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) (h_props i).1)
         rw [this, Nat.even_add] at h; simp at h
         exact h (Nat.even_pow.mpr ⟨by decide, Nat.ne_of_gt (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (by decide) (h_props i).1)⟩)
      rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even] at this; contradiction
